title: Array With Elements Not Equal to Average of Neighbors
titleCn: 构造元素不等于两相邻元素平均值的数组

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,3,4,5] Output: [1,2,4,5,3] Explanation: When i=1, nums[i] = 2, and the average of its neighbors is (1+4) / 2 = 2.5. When i=2, nums[i] = 4, and the average of its neighbors is (2+5) / 2 = 3.5. When i=3, nums[i] = 5, and the average of its neighbors is (4+3) / 2 = 3.5.
testcases.expectedOutput: [1,2,4,5,3] Explanation: When i=1, nums[i] = 2, and the average of its neighbors is (1+4) / 2 = 2.5. When i=2, nums[i] = 4, and the average of its neighbors is (2+5) / 2 = 3.5. When i=3, nums[i] = 5, and the average of its neighbors is (4+3) / 2 = 3.5.

testcases.input: nums = [6,2,0,9,7] Output: [9,7,6,2,0] Explanation: When i=1, nums[i] = 7, and the average of its neighbors is (9+6) / 2 = 7.5. When i=2, nums[i] = 6, and the average of its neighbors is (7+2) / 2 = 4.5. When i=3, nums[i] = 2, and the average of its neighbors is (6+0) / 2 = 3. Note that the original array [6,2,0,9,7] also satisfies the conditions.
testcases.expectedOutput: [9,7,6,2,0] Explanation: When i=1, nums[i] = 7, and the average of its neighbors is (9+6) / 2 = 7.5. When i=2, nums[i] = 6, and the average of its neighbors is (7+2) / 2 = 4.5. When i=3, nums[i] = 2, and the average of its neighbors is (6+0) / 2 = 3. Note that the original array [6,2,0,9,7] also satisfies the conditions.
